texto: If such things were not so dangerous one would laugh. But one recognizes the technique. Such propaganda always begins with words, but soon it proceeds to deeds. When there are no facts to support lies, facts must be made.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Eric Ambler sobre temas ligados a humor. A afirmação “If such things were not so dangerous one would laugh. But one recognizes the technique. Such prop…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, political, propaganda, útil em momentos de propaganda e warnings-about-society.

texto: I am tempted to find reason and justice in the fact that he died as violently and indecently as he lived. But that is too ingenuous a way out. It does not explain Dimitrios; it only apologizes for him. Special sorts of conditions must exist for the creation of the special sort of criminal that he typified...all I do know is that while might is right, while chaos and anarchy masquerade as order and enlightenment, those conditions will obtain.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Eric Ambler sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “I am tempted to find reason and justice in the fact that he died as violently and indecently as h…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, crime, psychology, útil em momentos de psychology e war.

texto: 1225International big business has made revolutions before now to safeguard its interests. At one time it made them … in the name of Liberty, Equality and Fraternity. Now, with Socialism to fight, it makes them in the name of Law and Order and Sound Finance. Assassination? If an assassination is going to be good for business, then there will be an assassination.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Eric Ambler que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “1225International big business has made revolutions before now to safeguard its interests. At one…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre negocios, betrayal, spy, com foco em spy.

texto: Yet, when these facts are seen side by side with other facts in the case, it is difficult not to become lost in superstitious awe. Their very absurdity seems to prohibit the use of the words 'chance' and 'coincidence.' For the sceptic there remains only one consolation: if there should be such a thing as superhuman Law, it is administered with sub-human inefficiency.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Eric Ambler sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Yet, when these facts are seen side by side with other facts in the case, it is difficult not to …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, chance, fortune, útil em momentos de fortune.

texto: Good' did not triumph. 'Evil' did not triumph. The two resolved, destroyed each other and created new 'evils', new 'goods' which slew each other in their turn.
